text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, December 31. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: That sounds critical. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
